name: okpack-detections-feed-fetch
_note: Enabled by default but HARMLESS until you populate feeds.opml: feed-fetch runs on schedule and makes ZERO upstream calls while the feed list is empty (it logs a clean 'no feeds' no-op). Populate feeds/feeds.opml to start ingesting. The `@jitter:2h` schedule is expanded to a concrete cron with a RANDOM minute at install (framework init/pull), so installs don't synchronize once feeds are live.
prompt: okpack-detections feed pull: fetch the detections OPML into raw/detections/ for the ingest lane. Pure script, wakeAgent=false.

name: okpack-detections-sigma-import
_note: THE seed. Pulls the open SigmaHQ ruleset (DRL-1.1) into detections/ — one detection page per rule with its ATT&CK covers_techniques as [[technique]] links (the detection-coverage seam). BOUNDED (SIGMA_LIMIT default 60; 1 GitHub API call + raw CDN fetches). no_agent, ZERO LLM tokens, MERGE-safe. Set GITHUB_TOKEN to lift the API limit.
prompt: Seed detection rules from SigmaHQ. Pure script, wakeAgent=false, ZERO LLM tokens.

name: okpack-detections-attack-mitigations
_note: Seeds one course-of-action page per ATT&CK mitigation (M####) from the public ATT&CK STIX (Enterprise+Mobile+ICS), wiring `mitigates` -> [[T####]] technique links (the mitigate side of the coverage map; the detect side is sigma_import). no_agent, ZERO LLM tokens, MERGE-safe. ATT&CK changes a few times a year -> weekly.
prompt: Seed ATT&CK mitigations as course-of-action pages. Pure script, wakeAgent=false, ZERO LLM tokens.
